name: rooot-footage
description: ROOOT footage rig -- read-only, automated screen capture of the LIVE product during real matches: continuous phone-viewport video segments of /live and /ground plus a tagged event timeline (events.jsonl), the raw material for the demo video. Own package.json (playwright + ws, same isolation approach as scripts/canary). Strictly write-free on the wire: the canary's frame-allowlist WebSocket tap is enforced inside every recorded page, and the rig's own watcher connection never sends a byte.
